# Rishabh Singh — Data Scientist | IIT Madras

> Data Scientist at Chryselys (Oct 2024 – present) specialising in time-series forecasting, mixed-effects models, Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM), and pharma commercial analytics. B.S. Data Science and Applications, IIT Madras, CGPA 7.89, Minor in Economics & Finance (Sep 2021 – Apr 2025). Open-source contributor to [CPython](https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/134804), [conda-build](https://github.com/conda/conda-build/pull/4782), and [librosa](https://github.com/librosa/librosa/pull/1850).

## Identity
- Full name: Rishabh Singh
- Role: Data Scientist & AI Engineer
- Employer: Chryselys (Oct 2024 – present)
- Education: Indian Institute of Technology Madras — B.S. Data Science and Applications, CGPA 7.89, Sep 2021 – Apr 2025, Minor in Economics & Finance
- Prior experience: ML Engineer Intern, iNeuron.ai (Mar 2024 – Apr 2024)
- Location: Hyderabad, India
- Achievement: Rank-3, CodeChef Programming Competition, IIT Madras (2022)

## Technical Skills
- Languages: Python, SQL, R, Bash, JavaScript
- ML & Analytics: Time Series Forecasting, Mixed-Effects Models (LME/LMM), Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM), scikit-learn, XGBoost, PyTorch, TensorFlow, NLP, LLM Pipelines, A/B Testing, Bayesian Inference, Feature Engineering
- Frameworks & Tools: Streamlit, Flask, FastAPI, Tableau, Databricks, Dataiku, PySpark, Git, Jupyter, Figma
- Cloud & Infra: Azure, AWS, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, CI/CD, MLOps, REST APIs, ETL

## Open-Source Contributions
- [CPython PR #134804](https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/134804): Merged contribution to Python's core interpreter.
- [conda-build PR #4782](https://github.com/conda/conda-build/pull/4782): Merged package management improvement.
- [librosa PR #1850](https://github.com/librosa/librosa/pull/1850): Merged feature enhancement to the audio ML library.

## Projects
- [Parking Management System](https://parking.rishabhsingh.me): Live full-stack parking system (Flask, Vue.js, Redis, Celery, Azure).
- [Compass — Bloglite](https://compass.rishabhsingh.me): Multi-user blogging platform with Flask, SQLAlchemy ORM, JWT auth, REST API.
- [LLM YouTube Metadata Pipeline](https://github.com/rishabh11336/LLM-Youtube-Metadata-connecter-): End-to-end LLM pipeline for YouTube metadata generation via Claude Desktop.
- [Phishing Domain Detection](https://github.com/rishabh11336/Phishing-Domain-Detection): Random Forest URL classifier; Flask REST API deployed on Azure.
- [Indian Housing ETL Pipeline](https://github.com/rishabh11336/ETL-INDIAN-House-Price-Data): 180k+ records scraped and loaded into PostgreSQL + MongoDB.

## Blog (23 published articles)
Series "In a Minute" (11 posts): Dense visual breakdowns of ML concepts — Transformers, SVMs, CNNs, Forecasting, Bayesian Learning, Confusion Matrix, Linear Regression, Confidence Intervals vs Prediction Intervals.
Series "Web Development" (4 posts): CORS in Flask, HTTP Methods, Lazy Loading, Flask Session Login.
Series "Python" (8 posts): Virtual environments, conda, requirements.txt, matrix multiplication, sets vs lists, if __name__ == '__main__', converting programs to exe.
